notableEvents.label: Kody Clemens GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Kody Clemens out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña steals (10) 3rd base. Luisangel Acuña scores. Throwing error by catcher Alex Jackson.

notableEvents.label: Brooks Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Brooks Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Brooks Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler pops out to shortstop Colson Montgomery. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.
